pubmed.query: ("rheumatoid arthritis"[Title/Abstract] OR "systemic lupus erythematosus"[Title/Abstract] OR "lupus nephritis"[Title/Abstract] OR "Sjogren syndrome"[Title/Abstract] OR "Sjögren disease"[Title/Abstract] OR "systemic sclerosis"[Title/Abstract] OR "idiopathic inflammatory myopathy"[Title/Abstract] OR dermatomyositis[Title/Abstract] OR spondyloarthritis[Title/Abstract] OR "psoriatic arthritis"[Title/Abstract] OR "ANCA-associated vasculitis"[Title/Abstract] OR "giant cell arteritis"[Title/Abstract] OR "Takayasu arteritis"[Title/Abstract] OR "Behcet disease"[Title/Abstract] OR "antiphospholipid syndrome"[Title/Abstract] OR "IgG4-related disease"[Title/Abstract] OR "adult-onset Still disease"[Title/Abstract] OR "familial Mediterranean fever"[Title/Abstract] OR gout[Title/Abstract] OR "juvenile idiopathic arthritis"[Title/Abstract]) NOT "lupus vulgaris"[Title/Abstract]
